concept: A high-end, brutalist-inspired 'Command Center' for social media marketing. It strips away soft gradients and bloated UI, focusing on stark data clarity, crisp borders, and aggressive kinetic typography.

marketing.strategy: Bento Grid Protocol - Mode A (Tetris Grid). Asymmetric, high visual tension.

dashboard.strategy: Control Room Grid. Dense, data-heavy, maximizing viewport space.
dashboard.grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 font-medium tracking-wide rounded-sm border border-transparent transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-foreground border border-border hover:border-foreground transition-all rounded-sm
buttons.cta_large: px-8 py-6 text-lg bg-primary text-white hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white transition-all rounded-none

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-card border border-border rounded-sm shadow-none hover:border-foreground/20 transition-colors

forms.input: border-border bg-white rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-foreground focus:border-foreground transition-all
forms.label: text-sm font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground

badges.pending: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border border-amber-200 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.in_progress: bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border border-blue-200 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.completed: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium
badges.canceled: bg-red-100 text-red-800 border border-red-200 rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium

motion.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a subtle 'Editorial Ribbon' of supported platforms (FB, IG, TT, X)

hero_image.alt: Modern creative agency workspace representing SMM operations
hero_image.description: Primary visual for the marketing landing page hero section. Apply a bg-black/30 overlay if text is placed on top, or use alongside an asymmetric layout.

auth_background.description: Background image for the split-screen authentication page (Login/Register).

partner_logo_1.description: To be used in the Add Funds section or footer.

partner_logo_2.description: To be used in the Services section representing FB/IG.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide-React for all standard UI icons (dashboard nav, quick actions, settings). For actual social platform logos, use react-icons (e.g., FaFacebook, FaInstagram, FaTiktok, FaXTwitter).

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='submit-order-button', data-testid='nav-dashboard-link').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure black/white combinations meet 4.5:1 ratio. Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-foreground hover:text-white).

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Add Clash Display and Manrope to the global CSS and configure them in tailwind.config.js as the primary sans fonts. DO NOT use Inter or Roboto.

MARKETING PAGE: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the landing page structure (do not force Shadcn 'Card' here). Build a hero section with massive 'Clash Display' typography, a marquee showing social platforms, and an asymmetric bento grid for the features.

DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Create a persistent sidebar nav and a dense top header. Use 'grid-cols-4' or 'grid-cols-12' for the main content area. Make maximum use of screen real estate. Cards should have 1px borders and almost no border-radius (rounded-sm).
ORDER FORM: Build a multi-step or highly organized single-page form using Shadcn Select and Input components. Platform -> Service -> Link -> Quantity -> Price.
TABLES: Use a responsive data table for 'Orders List' and 'Transaction History'. Include status badges using the exact classes defined in this JSON.
ADMIN PANEL: Implement views for managing users, services (pricing/suppliers), and viewing all system transactions.
COLOR THEME: Stick to the strict monochrome base (FAFAFA to 0A0A0A) with Signal Red (#FF3300) reserved exclusively for primary CTAs (Submit Order, Add Funds, Login).

MEDIA: Use the provided media URLs exclusively. Do not use placeholder.com or dummy images. Apply a grayscale or high-contrast filter to the images via CSS (e.g., saturate-0 contrast-125) if it enhances the Swiss brutalist vibe.
